_comment: Volunteer page data. tags: quick (~2 hours), outdoor, onetime, recurring, friends (good with friends). To add an org, copy any entry and append — the page renders this file.

databases.name: United Way of Northwest Vermont
databases.what: The big local database — every open shift within 10 miles of Burlington, searchable by date.

databases.name: Idealist (formerly VolunteerMatch)
databases.what: National listings filtered to on-site opportunities posted in the past month.

databases.name: Vermont Connector
databases.what: A nonprofit directory listing Vermont organizations that need volunteers.

orgs.name: Burlington Parks, Recreation & Waterfront
orgs.what: Coach youth sports or keep city trails in shape as a Trail Steward.

orgs.name: Green Mountain Club
orgs.what: Maintain the Long Trail as a trail steward, corridor monitor, or part of a weekend work crew.

orgs.name: Intervale Center
orgs.what: Gleaning shifts, the Conservation Nursery, and land stewardship right in the Intervale.

orgs.name: Lake Champlain Basin Program
orgs.what: Citizen science on the lake — water quality monitoring and invasive species pulls.

orgs.name: Rock Point Commons
orgs.what: Gardening and tree care at the Community Homestead on Rock Point.

orgs.name: UVM Extension Master Gardener
orgs.what: Train as a Certified Extension Master Gardener or Composter and put it to work locally.

orgs.name: Vermont Center for Ecostudies
orgs.what: Community science you can do on your own schedule — track butterflies, birds, and other wildlife.

orgs.name: Vermont Fish & Wildlife
orgs.what: Become a volunteer instructor for hunter education or Let's Go Fishing programs.

orgs.name: VINS (Vermont Institute of Natural Science)
orgs.what: Animal care, docent shifts, and bird rescue transport for the raptor center.

orgs.name: Humane Society of Chittenden County
orgs.what: Dog walking, animal care, or fostering — the closest shelter to Burlington.

orgs.name: Central Vermont Humane Society
orgs.what: Animal care, office support, and transport runs.

orgs.name: North Country Animal League
orgs.what: Dog and cat care, dog walking, and community outreach.

orgs.name: Queen City Cats VT
orgs.what: Care for cats at the lounge, help with transport, or foster.

orgs.name: VT Dog Rescue
orgs.what: Foster a dog, or help with events and transportation.

orgs.name: Feeding Champlain Valley
orgs.what: Food shelf shifts for neighbors facing food insecurity — a classic two-hour slot.

orgs.name: Vermont Foodbank
orgs.what: Sort, pack, and distribute food — group shifts across the state that welcome crews of friends.

orgs.name: South Burlington Food Shelf
orgs.what: Actively taking new volunteers for regular shifts.

orgs.name: Green Mountain Habitat for Humanity
orgs.what: Swing a hammer on a build site or work a ReStore shift — no experience needed.

orgs.name: ANEW Place
orgs.what: Support neighbors experiencing homelessness — meal service is an easy first shift.

orgs.name: The Salvation Army (Greater Burlington)
orgs.what: A rotating mix of needs — email them and they'll find you a fit.

orgs.name: King Street Center
orgs.what: Seasonal events and campus clean-ups supporting kids and families in the King Street neighborhood.

orgs.name: Spectrum Youth & Family Services
orgs.what: Mentor a young person one-on-one — the highest-commitment, highest-impact slot on this page.

orgs.name: The Family Room
orgs.what: Food prep, events, garden support, and playgroups for New American and low-income families.

orgs.name: Outright Vermont
orgs.what: Youth group facilitation, events, and office help for LGBTQ+ youth.

orgs.name: Vermont Works for Women
orgs.what: Women and gender-expansive folks: be a career mentor, speaker, or instructor.

orgs.name: Age Well Vermont
orgs.what: Deliver Meals on Wheels or visit an older neighbor — routes take about two hours.

orgs.name: Cathedral Square
orgs.what: Support healthy homes and caring communities for older adults.

orgs.name: UVM Medical Center
orgs.what: Non-clinical roles — information desk, spiritual care, pediatrics.

orgs.name: OnCall for Vermont (Dept. of Health)
orgs.what: Sign up once, get called when public health emergencies need hands.

orgs.name: Flynn Center
orgs.what: Usher a show — you work the doors, then watch the performance free.

orgs.name: Fletcher Free Library
orgs.what: Library programs and outreach through Burlington Parks & Rec.

orgs.name: City of South Burlington Committees
orgs.what: Serve on a citizen committee — conservation, economic development, and more.
